text:
There once was a cat named Felicia. She lived in an apartment complex. Felicia loved jumping onto windowsills and watching birds. One day, a stranger moved into the apartment next door. This stranger had a pet rabbit.

The rabbit would always hop around Felicia's window. Even when Felicia wasn't there, the rabbit seemed to enjoy teasing her. It would hop right onto the sill, nibble Felicia's curtains, and prance around.

Felicia didn't enjoy it. One day, she saw her opportunity. As the rabbit hopped over, Felicia swiftely reached out and caught it. The rabbit squeaked in surprise.

"Oh my," Felicia thought to herself, "that was nice of you." She admired the rabbit's fur. 

From then on, Felicia made sure the rabbit was well-cared-for. It settled down, started to hop more slowly, and never dared hop onto the sill again.

Felicia and the rabbit became good friends.
